---
id: partial-update-payment-transaction-checkout
title: "Partially Update Payment Transaction"
description: "Partially update an existing Payment Transaction"
sidebar_label: "Partially Update Payment Transaction"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Partially Update Payment Transaction"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/b/checkout/v1/pymt-txn/{session_id}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Partially update an existing Payment Transaction
### Permissions

| Auth Method | Required Permissions |
|---|---|
| [API Key](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#api-key-auth) | All permissions (admin access) |
| [Basic Auth](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#basic-auth) | `Can change payment requests` or `Can change e-commerce payments` |

> **Gateway permission**: `Can use pg_code` for the target [payment gateway](/developers/payments/payment-methods/)

:::info
For PATCH, updates can be performed as long as the payment gateway
codes are not updated.
:::


<pre style={{display:"none"}}>{"curl --location --globoff --request PATCH 'https://sandbox.ottu.net/b/checkout/v1/pymt-txn/{session_id}/' \\\n--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n--header 'Accept: application/json' \\\n--header 'Authorization: Api-Key YOUR_API_KEY' \\\n--data-raw '{\n  \"amount\": \"string\",\n  \"currency_code\": \"string\",\n  \"pg_codes\": [\n    \"string\"\n  ],\n  \"type\": \"e_commerce\",\n  \"billing_address\": {\n    \"line1\": \"string\",\n    \"line2\": \"string\",\n    \"city\": \"string\",\n    \"state\": \"string\",\n    \"country\": \"AF\",\n    \"postal_code\": \"string\"\n  },\n  \"branding_options\": {\n    \"payment_methods\": {}\n  },\n  \"loyalty\": {\n    \"enabled\": true,\n    \"reference\": \"string\",\n    \"metadata\": {}\n  },\n  \"shipping_address\": {\n    \"line1\": \"string\",\n    \"line2\": \"string\",\n    \"city\": \"string\",\n    \"state\": \"string\",\n    \"country\": \"AF\",\n    \"postal_code\": \"string\",\n    \"first_name\": \"string\",\n    \"last_name\": \"string\",\n    \"email\": \"user@example.com\",\n    \"phone\": \"string\"\n  },\n  \"agreement\": {\n    \"id\": \"string\",\n    \"amount_variability\": \"fixed\",\n    \"start_date\": \"2024-07-29\",\n    \"expiry_date\": \"2024-07-29\",\n    \"max_amount_per_cycle\": \"string\",\n    \"cycle_interval_days\": 0,\n    \"total_cycles\": 0,\n    \"frequency\": \"irregular\",\n    \"type\": \"recurring\",\n    \"seller\": {\n      \"name\": \"string\",\n      \"short_name\": \"string\",\n      \"category_code\": \"string\"\n    }\n  },\n  \"attachment\": \"string\",\n  \"attachment_upload_url\": \"string\",\n  \"card_acceptance_criteria\": {\n    \"min_expiry_time\": 0\n  },\n  \"customer_birthdate\": \"2024-07-29\",\n  \"customer_email\": \"user@example.com\",\n  \"customer_first_name\": \"string\",\n  \"customer_id\": \"string\",\n  \"customer_last_name\": \"string\",\n  \"customer_phone\": \"string\",\n  \"customer_phone_2\": \"string\",\n  \"due_datetime\": \"2024-07-29T15:51:28.071Z\",\n  \"email_recipients\": [\n    \"user@example.com\"\n  ],\n  \"expiration_time\": \"string\",\n  \"generate_qr_code\": false,\n  \"include_sdk_setup_preload\": false,\n  \"initiator_id\": 0,\n  \"language\": \"en\",\n  \"notifications\": {\n    \"email\": [\n      \"created\"\n    ],\n    \"sms\": [\n      \"created\"\n    ],\n    \"whatsapp\": [\n      \"created\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"order_no\": \"string\",\n  \"payment_instrument\": {\n    \"instrument_type\": \"apple_pay\",\n    \"payload\": {\n      \"paymentData\": {\n        \"version\": \"string\",\n        \"data\": \"string\",\n        \"signature\": \"string\",\n        \"header\": {\n          \"ephemeralPublicKey\": \"string\",\n          \"publicKeyHash\": \"string\",\n          \"transactionId\": \"string\"\n        }\n      },\n      \"paymentMethod\": {\n        \"displayName\": \"string\",\n        \"network\": \"string\",\n        \"type\": \"string\"\n      },\n      \"transactionIdentifier\": \"string\"\n    }\n  },\n  \"payment_type\": \"one_off\",\n  \"preload_checkout_page\": false,\n  \"product_type\": \"string\",\n  \"redirect_url\": \"string\",\n  \"shortify_attachment_url\": false,\n  \"shortify_checkout_url\": false,\n  \"unit_code\": \"string\",\n  \"vendor_name\": \"string\",\n  \"webhook_url\": \"string\"\n}'"}</pre>
